moments.title: The Open Championship 2026
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's four major tournaments, begins its practice days at Royal Birkdale in Southport today, with tournament play running from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's greatest challenge
angles.copy: Golf's greatest challenge is underway! Practice rounds for The 154th Open at Royal Birkdale kick off today. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug this year?

angles.name: World's best golfers
angles.copy: The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale this week! The world's best golfers are already on the course for practice ahead of the main tournament starting Thursday.

angles.name: Sun's out, clubs are swinging
angles.copy: Sun's out, clubs are swinging! Get ready for a week of world-class golf as The Open Championship 2026 begins today with practice rounds in Southport.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing, dominating conversations and influencing summer TV schedules with its ongoing matches.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: World Cup fever is still gripping the nation! Who's impressed you most so far in the tournament?

angles.name: Favourite Moment
angles.copy: It's a World Cup summer, and the action continues! What's been your favourite moment from the tournament so far?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, a celebration of music, arts, and culture, kicks off on Wednesday in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides.

angles.name: Outer Hebrides Festival
angles.copy: Heading to the Outer Hebrides this week? The Hebridean Celtic Festival begins Wednesday, bringing a fantastic lineup of music and culture to Stornoway!

angles.name: Celtic Culture
angles.copy: Get ready for a dose of Celtic culture! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts this Wednesday, July 15th. Who's making the trip to Stornoway?

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottingham's biggest festival, Splendour, takes over Wollaton Hall & Deer Park this weekend with five stages of music.

angles.name: Nottingham Festival
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is this weekend! Nottingham, get ready for two days of incredible music at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Weekend Tickets
angles.copy: Who's got their tickets for Splendour Festival? It's all happening this Saturday and Sunday in Nottingham!

moments.title: Big Love Festival in Monmouthshire
moments.blurb: Big Love Festival, a vibrant independent music and arts festival, returns to Monmouthshire, Wales, from Thursday to Sunday.

angles.name: Wales Festival
angles.copy: Wales, get ready for Big Love! The independent music and arts festival kicks off in Monmouthshire this Thursday.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Festival vibes incoming! Big Love Festival brings four days of music and fun to Monmouthshire starting July 16th. Who's joining the party?

moments.title: Latest UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart is out, revealing the nation's biggest hits and hottest new tracks.

angles.name: Your Number One
angles.copy: What's your number one this week? The Official UK Singles Chart has dropped, featuring all the hottest tracks right now!

angles.name: Chart Battle
angles.copy: Chart battle! Whose track is dominating the Official UK Singles Chart this week? Tune in to find out the biggest songs in the country.

moments.title: Love Island UK 2026
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing fresh drama from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Another Night, Another Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! What's the latest in the villa? Who's coupling up and who's on the rocks?

angles.name: Love Island Season
angles.copy: It's Love Island season! Who are your favourite Islanders so far, and what's been the biggest shock of the series?

moments.title: The Dark (ITV)
moments.blurb: ITV's new gripping crime thriller, 'The Dark', set in the Scottish Highlands, premieres tonight on ITV1 and ITVX.

angles.name: New Crime Thriller
angles.copy: Fancy a new crime thriller? ITV's 'The Dark' premieres tonight, bringing a chilling mystery from the Scottish Highlands to your screen!

angles.name: Hide Behind Sofa
angles.copy: Get ready to hide behind the sofa! New ITV drama 'The Dark' starts tonight. Who's watching this Scottish Highlands mystery?

moments.title: The Westies (MGM+)
moments.blurb: New crime drama 'The Westies', set in 1980s Hell's Kitchen, premieres today on MGM+, perfect for fans of gangster sagas.

angles.name: Gangster Drama
angles.copy: If you're a fan of gangster dramas, 'The Westies' just dropped on MGM+! Dive into 1980s Hell's Kitchen tonight.

angles.name: New Crime Series
angles.copy: New crime series alert! 'The Westies' premieres today on MGM+. Get ready for some gritty 80s organised crime.

moments.title: Roger McGuinn (The Byrds)
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, the iconic frontman and guitarist of The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Byrds Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 84th birthday of rock legend Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! What's your favourite Byrds track?

angles.name: Jingling All The Way
angles.copy: Happy early birthday to Roger McGuinn! The Byrds' innovative guitarist turns 84 tomorrow. Still jingling all the way!

moments.title: Leon Bridges
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning soul and R&B singer Leon Bridges celebrates his 37th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Smooth Sounds
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to the smooth sounds of Leon Bridges, who turns 37 tomorrow! What's your go-to song from him?

angles.name: Soulful Hits
angles.copy: Tomorrow is Leon Bridges' 37th birthday! Get ready to groove to some of his soulful hits.

moments.title: Joe Satriani
moments.blurb: Legendary instrumental rock guitarist and 15-time Grammy nominee Joe Satriani celebrates his 70th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Shredding Into 70
angles.copy: Shredding into his 70th year! Happy birthday on Wednesday to the incredible Joe Satriani. What's your favourite Satch track?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Guitar hero Joe Satriani turns 70 this Wednesday! Get ready to crank up some of his iconic instrumental rock.

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Iconic singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile career spanning rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Incomparable Voice
angles.copy: Happy 80th birthday on Wednesday to the incomparable Linda Ronstadt! What's your favourite song from her incredible career?

angles.name: Legendary Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating the legendary Linda Ronstadt's 80th birthday this Wednesday! Her voice defined generations.

moments.title: David Hasselhoff
moments.blurb: Actor and singer David Hasselhoff, known as 'The Hoff', celebrates his 74th birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Don't Hassle The Hoff
angles.copy: Don't hassle The Hoff! David Hasselhoff turns 74 this Friday. What's your favourite Knight Rider or Baywatch memory?

angles.name: Looking For Freedom
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday on Friday to the one and only David Hasselhoff! Get ready for some 'Looking For Freedom' vibes!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: The prolonged heatwave across England and Wales continues into next week, with temperatures exceeding 30C and high wildfire warnings in place.

angles.name: Stay Cool
angles.copy: Stay cool out there! The UK heatwave continues, with high temperatures expected across England and Wales all week. Remember to stay hydrated!

angles.name: Scorching Day
angles.copy: Another scorching day across parts of the UK! Highs over 30C and wildfire warnings are in place. How are you beating the heat?

angles.name: Devon to Yorkshire
angles.copy: From Devon to Yorkshire, the heatwave is sticking around! What are your top tips for keeping cool in this prolonged hot spell?

moments.title: School Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: Summer holidays are officially underway or beginning this week for many schools across the UK, bringing longer days and family fun.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many across the UK are now officially on their summer holidays. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Great Summer Getaway
angles.copy: The great summer getaway is beginning! Are your kids already off, or are you counting down the days until the school holidays start this week?

angles.name: Hello Summer
angles.copy: Hello, summer holidays! Wishing everyone a fantastic break as schools across the UK wrap up for the year.
